summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Swar Shah consultancy site. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed (health, auth login/me, contact submit/list, blog full CRUD, auth guards). Frontend: home hero, nav, services section, service cards (7), project cards (3), case study navigation and content, FAQ accordion, sticky CTA, contact form submission with sonner success toast, blog list page, and full admin flow (login -> create -> edit -> delete post -> submissions tab) all verified working. No console errors on Home.
action_items: MINOR / NAMING: Review request specified service card testids as 'service-card-{slug}' but implementation uses 'service-{slug}' in /app/frontend/src/sections/ServicesSection.jsx line 28. Cards render fine functionally; if E2E test contract requires the 'service-card-' prefix, update the JSX to `service-card-${service.slug}`.

MINOR / NAMING: Review request mentions case-study CTAs as 'case-study-live-demo' and 'case-study-github'; those data-testids are absent (buttons exist with correct text 'Live Demo' / 'GitHub' and are functional). Consider adding data-testid to the two CTA links in /app/frontend/src/pages/CaseStudy.jsx for stable selection.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: DELETE /api/blog returns 200 with body {status:'deleted'} — spec-compliant but 204 No Content is more idiomatic; not blocking.

server.py: CORS is set with allow_origins from env (default '*') plus allow_credentials=True. Passing '*' with credentials is invalid per browsers/spec; harmless right now since we don't rely on cookies, but should be explicit origins if httpOnly cookie flow is enabled later.

Admin auth is Bearer-token only in frontend (localStorage-based per /app/frontend/src/lib/auth.jsx). Backend supports cookie fallback but frontend does not set it; acceptable given single-admin scope.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ contact submissions and TEST blog posts during e2e; the blog test data was deleted at end of run. Contact submissions remain in DB (no delete endpoint exposed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin creds validated. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is a good regression baseline (15 tests, ~3s). Only cosmetic mismatch is service-card testid naming; treat as minor unless a specific external contract depends on 'service-card-{slug}'.
